title: Beta Refreshed!
description: Improves the beta experience with QOL fixes and new features!
body:
A modpack that makes beta 1.7.3 more fun. bug fixes, qol mods, more features like infdev or alpha terrain generation and isometric screenshots! even the once useless gold tools and armour now have special benifits such as silk touch! and many many more features! find out yourself and play now!

:works with Prism launcher, requires java 17:
